title: ficus virens var. glabella
intro: Ficus virens var. glabella, also known as the Banyan fig, is a tropical plant species native to the tropical forests of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Ficus virens var. glabella can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat various ailments.
